title: Papa John's Pepperoni Pizza Menu with Prices 2026
description: Explore the 2026 USA price list for Papa John's Pepperoni Pizza. Includes Small, Medium, Large, and Extra-Large sizes along with complete nutrition facts and seasoning secrets.
fullContent:
The Papa John's Pepperoni Pizza is more than just a menu item; it is a global phenomenon and the undisputed king of pizza delivery across the United States. In 2026, it continues to lead the charts as the most ordered classic pizza, loved for its perfect ratio of savory, spicy pepperoni to melted 100% real mozzarella cheese. If you are looking to save on your next order, be sure to check our latest Papa John's Coupons for exclusive deals.

What sets our Pepperoni Pizza apart from the competition starts with the foundation: our original hand-tossed dough. Made with just six simple ingredients, our dough is never frozen and arrives fresh at every Papa John's location across the USA. This ensures a chewy, golden-brown crust that serves as the perfect canvas for our world-famous signature pizza sauce. Made from vine-ripened tomatoes grown in the sun-drenched valleys of California, our sauce is packed and canned within hours of harvest to lock in that natural sweetness.

As we move to the toppings, we layer a generous amount of premium, high-quality pepperoni slices. These aren't your average pizza toppings; they are specially seasoned to reach a perfect crispiness in our high-heat ovens, releasing just the right amount of spicy oil to meld with the cheese. For those watching their intake, you can review the official Papa John's Nutrition Guide which states that a single slice of our standard 14-inch Large original crust pepperoni pizza contains approximately 230-320 calories.

Whether you're ordering a 'Small' for a quick lunch in downtown Manhattan or an 'Extra Large' for a late-night party in Los Angeles, Papa John's ensures regional price consistency with high value. Our 2026 price guide reflects the best value for money in the fast-food industry, especially when you join Papa Rewards® to earn points on every dollar spent. Experience the recipe that defined an era of better ingredients and better pizza.

faqs.question: How much is a Large Pepperoni Pizza in 2026?
faqs.answer: As of 2026, a Large (14-inch) Pepperoni Pizza at Papa John's typically costs around **$17.99** in most USA locations. Pricing for the Epic Stuffed Crust version is approximately **$20.99**.

faqs.question: How many slices are in a Medium vs Large Papa John's pizza?
faqs.answer: A Medium (12") pizza comes with **8 slices**, while a Large (14") pizza is typically cut into **8 larger slices** (but can be square-cut or double-cut upon request).

faqs.question: Does Papa John's use real cheese on the Pepperoni Pizza?
faqs.answer: Yes, Papa John's prides itself on using **100% real mozzarella cheese** made from high-quality milk. We never use starch-based fillers or analog cheeses.

title: Papa John's The Works™ Pizza Menu with Prices 2026
description: Get the complete guide to Papa John's The Works™ pizza. Explore 2026 prices for Small to Extra Large sizes, inclusive of all 8 premium toppings and nutrition facts.
fullContent:
When you want everything on your pizza, **The Works™ from Papa John's** is the ultimate choice. As one of the most loaded specialty pizzas in the industry, it combines premium meats and fresh-cut vegetables to create a symphony of flavors that has defined 'Better Ingredients' for decades. In 2026, it remains a top-tier choice for families looking for maximum value. Be sure to check our Active Coupons to get The Works at a discount today.

The magic of The Works™ lies in its diversity. We start with our original, never-frozen dough and apply a generous layer of our vine-ripened tomato sauce. Then comes the massive topping load: spicy Italian sausage, premium pepperoni, julienne-cut Canadian bacon, fresh-cut onions, crisp green peppers, mushrooms, and ripe black olives. All of this is smothered in 100% real mozzarella cheese. This pizza is so heavy that we recommend ordering it on our Original Crust to handle the weight.

From a nutritional standpoint, a single slice of a Large The Works™ pizza contains approximately 290-360 calories. For a full breakdown, the Official Papa John's Nutrition Guide provides detailed insights for health-conscious diners. Whether you are ordering a late-night feast in Chicago or a weekend treat in Houston, you can find the nearest branch using our Store Locator. Join Papa Rewards® to earn points on every 'Works' pizza you order in 2026.

faqs.question: What specifically is on Papa John's The Works™ pizza?
faqs.answer: The Works™ features a massive combination of **8 premium toppings**: Pepperoni, spicy Italian sausage, Canadian bacon, fresh-cut onions, green peppers, mushrooms, and black olives, all on top of 100% real mozzarella cheese.

faqs.question: Does Papa John's offer a Thin Crust for The Works™ in 2026?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can swap the Original Crust for a crispy **Thin Crust** on Large and Extra Large sizes. This often reduces the calorie count per slice compared to the hand-tossed version.

faqs.question: Is The Works™ the most calorie-heavy pizza at Papa John's?
faqs.answer: While it is heavily loaded, 'The Meats' typically has a slightly higher calorie count due to the density of meat toppings. The Works™ provides a better nutritional balance with its mix of 5 vegetables and 3 meats.

title: Papa John's Philly Cheesesteak Papadia Price & Review 2026
description: Everything you need to know about the Philly Cheesesteak Papadia. Explore 2026 prices, ingredient breakdown, and dipping sauce pairings for this lunch favorite.
fullContent:
The **Philly Cheesesteak Papadia** is a culinary masterpiece inspired by the classic flavors of Philadelphia, reimagined into a portable flatbread sandwich. Since its launch, it has become a staple for lunch-goers and solo diners across the United States. In 2026, it remains one of the highest-value items on the Papa John's Menu. To save even more on your lunch break, view our Daily Deals.

What makes the Philly Papadia stand out is the quality of the fillings. We use tender, sliced steak strips combined with fresh-cut onions and green peppers. Instead of standard pizza sauce, this sandwich features a rich, creamy garlic sauce base and melted mozzarella cheese. It is all folded into a toasted flatbread made from our original signature dough. It is a handheld version of a 'Super Loaded' experience, making it perfect for on-the-go meals in busy cities like New York or Seattle.

According to Cheesesteak history, the combination of steak and onions is a timeless American tradition, and Papa John's honors this with every Papadia made. One Philly Cheesesteak Papadia contains roughly 810 calories and is served with our iconic Special Garlic dipping sauce. Ensure you are getting the best price in 2026 by using the Store Locator to find regional pricing at your nearest Papa John's.

faqs.question: What is inside the Philly Cheesesteak Papadia?
faqs.answer: It is filled with **tender sliced steak**, fresh onions, green peppers, mozzarella cheese, and a creamy garlic sauce—but NO traditional pizza sauce—all folded into a toasted flatbread.

faqs.question: Can I customize a Papa John's Papadia in 2026?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can add extra toppings like jalapeños or extra steak, and you can även request a **Parmesan Crusted** version which is a popular 2026 specialization.

faqs.question: Is the Philly Cheesesteak Papadia served with sauce?
faqs.answer: Yes, every Philly Cheesesteak Papadia is served with a side of our famous **Special Garlic Dipping Sauce** for the ultimate flavor experience.
